nasb.text: Jesus *said to him, “The foxes have holes and the birds of the air have nests, but the Son of Man has nowhere to lay His head.”

esv.text: And Jesus said to him, “Foxes have holes, and birds of the air have nests, but the Son of Man has nowhere to lay his head.”

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“狐狸有洞，天空的飛鳥有窩，但人子卻沒有棲身的地方。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“狐狸有洞，飞鸟有窝，人子却没有安枕之处。”

csbs.text: 耶稣对他说：“狐狸有洞，天空的飞鸟有窝，人子却没有枕头的地方。”
